SEARCH
Package com.krishcpatel.realm.skills.repository

Class SkillsRepository

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.skills.repository.SkillsRepository
public final class SkillsRepository extends Object
Persistence layer for skill xp and levels.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SkillsRepository(DatabaseManager db)
    Creates the skills repository.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ensureSkill(Connection c, String playerUuid, String skillId, int startingLevel, long updatedAt)
    Ensures a progress row exists for a player and skill.

    getSkill(String playerUuid, String skillId)
    Returns a single skill progress row for a player.

    Returns a single skill progress row using an existing connection.

    Returns all stored skill progress rows for a player.

    Creates the skills schema if it does not exist.

  • Constructor Details

    • SkillsRepository

      public SkillsRepository(DatabaseManager db)
      Creates the skills repository.
      Parameters:
      db - database manager

  • Method Details

    • initSchema

      public void initSchema() throws SQLException
      Creates the skills schema if it does not exist.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if schema creation fails

    • getSkills

      public List<SkillProgress> getSkills(String playerUuid) throws SQLException
      Returns all stored skill progress rows for a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as string
      Returns:
      stored skill progress rows
      Throws:
      SQLException - if query fails

    • getSkill

      public SkillProgress getSkill(String playerUuid, String skillId) throws SQLException
      Returns a single skill progress row for a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as string
      skillId - normalized skill id
      Returns:
      stored progress row, or null when missing
      Throws:
      SQLException - if query fails

    • getSkill

      public SkillProgress getSkill(Connection c, String playerUuid, String skillId) throws SQLException
      Returns a single skill progress row using an existing connection.
      Parameters:
      c - active connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as string
      skillId - normalized skill id
      Returns:
      stored progress row, or null when missing
      Throws:
      SQLException - if query fails

    • ensureSkill

      public void ensureSkill(Connection c, String playerUuid, String skillId, int startingLevel, long updatedAt) throws SQLException
      Ensures a progress row exists for a player and skill.
      Parameters:
      c - active connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as string
      skillId - normalized skill id
      startingLevel - initial level when inserting
      updatedAt - update timestamp
      Throws:
      SQLException - if write fails

    • updateSkill

      public void updateSkill(Connection c, String playerUuid, String skillId, int level, long xp, long totalXp, long updatedAt) throws SQLException
      Updates persisted skill progress values.
      Parameters:
      c - active connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as string
      skillId - normalized skill id
      level - updated level
      xp - updated current xp
      totalXp - updated lifetime xp
      updatedAt - update timestamp
      Throws:
      SQLException - if write fails
